description: A styled screenshot of a Bloomberg news article, cropped to show the article header on a white background. Top-left small caption reads 'Politics | US'. The bold black serif headline reads 'Trump's Ivy League Deals Set to Funnel Cash to Trade Schools'. Below the headline is a row of circular social-share icons (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, email, link, gift, and a 'B' Bloomberg icon). Beneath that is a photograph of a stone archway on an Ivy League-style campus, with red-brick buildings on either side, a carved eagle/heraldic crest above the arch, wet brick walkway, two orange e-scooters parked at the base, and a lone figure walking through the arch under an overcast sky. A circular expand/fullscreen icon sits in the upper right of the photo. The tweet text is two emoji ('eyes' and 'fire').
notable_text: Trump's Ivy League Deals Set to Funnel Cash to Trade Schools
